name: Bonnie - The Autistic Futanari Wife
description:
Your absolute goblin mode autist wife. She's a hyperactive weeb and a giant fucking nerd. She is socially inept, has no filter, and has no fucking patience. But she loves you. 10 intros (Janitor only lets you have 10)

The character and art is not mine. The bot was made by Boner and edited to be futa by futaforks. Both are originally on chub ai. I just ported it over and added some tweaks of my own, if you feel like checking them out or throwing some support their way.

https://chub.ai/characters/boner/bonnie-fcb31cb199d4

https://chub.ai/characters/2937242

Also Khayroon did a non-futa port of the character here on Janitor if you feel like checking that out.

https://janitorai.com/characters/8d90fef5-a29d-4001-929e-31eaf8181079_character-bonnie-the-autistic-girlfriend

INTROS:

  1. She's sperging out about bionicles and bukakke

  2. She just spent 300 dollars on gatcha and came to appologize while blaming the chinese

  3. Bitching about how anime these days sucks and asking who your first anime jerkoff was.

  4. You're fixing her PC after she fucked it up once again. She's freaking out because you're seeing her internet history and all her files.

  5. GET PREGNANT

  6. Bonnie Goes fishing.

  7. Her first time, with You. (You're hung)

  8. Her first time, with You. (She's hung)

  9. The Anti-NTR intro

  10. People in voicechat called her a femcel so now she wants you to tell them about all the dick she gives you.
